name: Milk Chocolate Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, greased roasting pan, combine the popped popcorn and nuts.
2. In a large, heavy saucepan, combine the milk chocolate chips, corn syrup, and butter.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils, stirring constantly.
4. Pour the hot mixture over the popcorn and toss well to coat evenly.
5. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 300°F and bake for 45 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Allow the popcorn to cool completely before storing it in an airtight container for up to two weeks.
